name: Potatoes'n' Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1 cup frozen hash brown potatoes with onions and peppers
2 slices turkey bacon, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 carton frozen egg product, thawed or 4 eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwave-safe casserole dish, mix together the potatoes and bacon. Cover and cook on high power for 3 to 5 minutes, or until tender, stirring once.
2. Beat the eggs and salt; stir into the potatoes.
3. Cook uncovered on high for 1 to 3 minutes, or until almost set. After 1 minute, push the cooked egg to the center of the dish, then every 15 seconds.
4. Sprinkle with cheese and let stand for 1 minute before serving. Serves 2.
